title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A quiet wind rolls over Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan anticipates that Ines Fujin might be
able to outrun everyone on the long track, so
she's ready to give it her all to keep pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Ines expects that Ryan will
unmistakably catch up, giving her extra
motivation to break away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the grand race where the front runner, Ines
Fujin, and the chaser, Mejiro Ryan, will collide!
